sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; const DoctorPortal = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('cohort'); return (

Clinician Tools

{activeTab === 'cohort' && (

Patient Cohort Analyzer

Compare sub-populations and analyze trends.

Total Patients analyzed 12,543
At-Risk Group (High) 14%
Avg. Recovery Rate 89%
[Interactive Cohort Graph Visualization]
)} {activeTab === 'interpretability' && (

Model Interpretability

Understand which features influenced the AI's diagnosis the most.

[SHAP / LIME Feature Importance Visualization]
Top Feature Blood Pressure (Systolic)
Model Confidence Bias Minimal (< 2%)
)} {activeTab === 'reporting' && (

Automated Reporting and Referral

Generate standard formatted reports for cross-department referrals.

Generate Patient Summary

Includes AI hypothesis, patient history, and suggested next steps.

Today, 09:41 AM
Report Sent: Referral to Cardiology (Dr. Smith) for Patient ID #8921. Status: Delivered
Yesterday, 14:20 PM
Report Generated: Routine discharge summary for Patient ID #8843. Status: Saved to EHR
)} {activeTab === 'pathways' && (

Diagnostic Pathways & Treatment Suggestions

AI-assisted guided pathways for complex cases.

Pathway Start

Symptom: Severe Chest Pain

Active: Patient #6621

Current Stage: Awaiting Troponin levels.

)} {activeTab === 'alerts' && (

Predictive Alerts & Notifications

Real-time ward monitoring and early warning system.

URGENT: Patient #1102 (Bed 4)

AI detects 85% probability of imminent sepsis onset based on vitals trend.

WARNING: Patient #0994 (Bed 12)

Blood pressure dropping over past 2 hours. Review advised.

UPDATE: Ward 3 Capacity

Normal. 4 beds available. Discharge predicting 2 more beds by 5 PM.

)}
); }; export default DoctorPortal;
